## Example

```esql
ROW wkt = "POLYGON ((30 10, 40 40, 20 40, 10 20, 30 10))"
| EVAL geom = TO_GEOSHAPE(wkt)
```

| wkt:keyword | geom:geo_shape |
| --- | --- |
| "POLYGON ((30 10, 40 40, 20 40, 10 20, 30 10))" | POLYGON ((30 10, 40 40, 20 40, 10 20, 30 10)) |
